description: Ironforge session hooks: LSP detection and plugin availability check

hooks.prompt: Ironforge is active. Check if all 6 dependency plugins are available in this session: BMAD (@bmad-agent-analyst, @bmad-agent-architect, @bmad-agent-sm, @bmad-agent-dev, @bmad-brainstorming agents), Superpowers (TDD enforcement), Sudocode (upsert_spec, upsert_issue), Context7 (use context7), security-guidance (pre-tool hook), and code-review (/code-review). If any are missing, briefly tell the user to run /setup. Then check the project for Cargo.toml and tsconfig.json/package.json and confirm which LSPs are active.
